programmes.show_description: Comedy thriller with Nicolas Cage. Two cops discover a drug dealer's hidden safe and hatch a plan to break into it, but by the time they realise it's a bad idea, it's too late to turn back.
Chilling Gothic horror. A young woman investigates a string of supernatural events that appear to be linked to the suicide of her aristocratic husband's first wife.
Horror Channel returns soon.

A woman fights with her mother and step-father over the payback of household expenses.
A woman claims mould took over her home and she lost nine women's tenancies; her landlord insists there was no water damage.
Ex-roommates admit guns were in play during the difficult time they tried to live together; a purebred cat is allegedly left to fend for itself.
A Montgomery realtor suggests a profitmaking plan to a homeowner which he claims ended in harassment and thousands in debt.
A man accuses his ex-girlfriend of smashing out his car windows; she claims it was his new girlfriend who did the deed.
A woman kicks her son out of her house on Mother's Day and is left to deal with a troubled teenager living in her basement.
A musician accuses a man of destroying her $11,500 violin when he allegedly fell on it while intoxicated; he claims it was a medical condition.
A 13-year-old boy is asked to step out of the courtroom before his family members start fighting over living expenses and a restraining order.
Breaking up via a text message, inappropriate courtroom attire and a used computer come into play when exes dispute custody of a Lenovo laptop.

A retired UPS driver reveals new details about cult leader David Koresh and what led up to the deadly standoff with law enforcement nearly 25 years ago.
Helen Torbet visited the Highlands every year, but over the years the son of its proprietors - Don MacMillan Junior - had developed an unhealthy obsession with her.
In the US, Rebecca Fenton murdered her husband and staged a break-in. Her calm, image-obsessed behaviour masked a chilling psychology. She was sentenced to life in 2015.
James Ray III, a US lawyer with a secret past, kills his partner Angela after an abusive relationship. He flees, is caught, but dies in jail before sentencing.

Movie star Bunny Blake receives a mysterious opal ring from her hometown fan club which enables her to see images of her friends and family.
After causing a hit-and-run accident that killed a child, then letting his co-worker take the blame, a man is relentlessly haunted by his suddenly aggressive car.
Action thriller with Arnold Schwarzenegger. A disgraced narcotics cop-turned-sheriff on the Mexican border gets the chance to prove his worth when an escaped drug lord tries to flee the US.
Thriller with Sylvester Stallone. A bereaved and alcoholic FBI agent in rehab discovers that a killer is targeting the patients - forcing him to pull himself together to prevent more deaths.
Thriller with Henry Cavill. A man searching for his abducted family discovers that his father has been leading a double-life as a CIA agent - and has stolen top-secret information.

A woman claims she was frightened for her and her children's lives by an ex-boyfriend; he presents texts that tell a different story.
A woman charges at the allegedly drunk father of her child, jumps on his back and beats him on the head; she sues him for a false arrest
A man's death, a valuable witness and a car allegedly sold on consignment come into play when a Cadillac sale goes bad.
Ex-girlfriends fight over the alleged commercialisation of personal artwork intended to demonstrate acceptance and love during a major life transition.
A simple carpool to worship service ends in an auto accident and a hefty insurance settlement debate.
A woman airs her dirty laundry with the world when she discovers the father of her child is cheating on her.
A couple wait three years for a man's prison release to start their relationship, only to have it end with a heated assault.
A teenager accuses a teacher of punching him in the chest during an incident at school; the teacher countersues for attorney fees and punitive damages.
Teenagers brawl in a parking lot and the police are called in; damages from alleged kicking, spitting on and keying cars are disputed.

When Carole Packman disappeared, her husband managed to convince police that she had walked out - a decade later, detectives piece together what really happened.
Percy Mapleton identified bond trader Isaac Gold as his target to make a fortune. But, a robbery on a moving train turned into tragedy.
Nasen Saadi stabbed two women at Bournemouth beach in 2024, killing one. Caught via CCTV and bank records, he denied guilt but was convicted for revenge-driven violence.
When Anthony Ashley-Cooper disappeared in 2005, his family feared that he had been kidnapped, but evidence confirmed that he had been murdered for his money.

A space commander returns from a decades-long solo mission into deep space, only to discover that some things haven't changed at all.
A man trying to win back his girlfriend discovers that he has the ability to trade physical characteristics with whoever agrees to the swap.
Claustrophobic horror with Olivia Williams. A US submarine crew on a routine mission during WWII descends into madness after an unrelenting series of terrifying and sinister events.
Historical action with Michael Fassbender. A Roman centurion leads his men on a daring mission to rescue his captured general after his legion is wiped out by Pictish rebels.
